summary: Audience recording captures a solid Bay‑Area show with a smoking second set, standout Space and an unforgettable So Many Roads ending, all rendered in good sound quality.
review: The performance is praised as one of the last great home‑turf shows, featuring a tight first set, a blistering second set highlighted by Space and Jerry’s soaring So Many Roads finale, plus a rare Days Between solo. The audience tape is described as surprisingly clear—better than some soundboard releases—making the show enjoyable despite the era’s mixed reputation.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are generally positive about the musical performance (solid sets, standout jams) but note average to good recording quality; four reviews give a spread of 5‑3 stars, leading to an overall rating just under 4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough for the Coliseum venue; reviewers call it "nice" and even better than some SBD releases, with no major drop‑outs or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A solid first set followed by a smoking second set; the post‑drums segment and Space provide an adventurous climax, while So Many Roads delivers an emotional finale.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for a rare solo on Days Between, an "out there" Space performance, and an unforgettable ending to So Many Roads that still moves listeners.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mention of a strong post‑drums segment leading into the Space jam.
